message:
fix(tests): update restore_layout test assertions to match Error::Runtime Display format

Three tests expected bare error messages ("simulated spawn failure") but
Error::Runtime wraps them with "Runtime error: " prefix via thiserror Display.
Updated assertions to match actual output. All 21,135 lib tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
